# Red Pill Wiki

> A bilingual Vietnamese/English knowledge vault for critical thinking, sovereignty, esoterica, health, mental models, revisionist research, science/tech, and crypto/finance.

Red Pill Wiki is a public second brain organized as an interconnected Quartz knowledge graph. The site favors source discipline, pattern recognition, bilingual explanations, and explicit distinction between documented facts, systems readings, symbolic readings, and speculative synthesis.

## Start here

- [Homepage](https://redpill.wiki/)
- [How to Read Red Pill Wiki](https://redpill.wiki/C%C3%A1ch-%C4%90%E1%BB%8Dc-Red-Pill-Wiki)
- [Source Discipline](https://redpill.wiki/Source-Discipline---K%E1%BB%B7-Lu%E1%BA%ADt-Ngu%E1%BB%93n-V%C3%A0-B%E1%BA%B1ng-Ch%E1%BB%A9ng)
- [Glossary](https://redpill.wiki/Glossary---T%E1%BB%AB-%C4%90i%E1%BB%83n-Red-Pill-Wiki)

## Core maps

- [Esoterica & Consciousness](https://redpill.wiki/MOC---Esoterica--and--Consciousness)
- [Health Sovereignty](https://redpill.wiki/MOC---Health-Sovereignty)
- [Epistemology & Propaganda](https://redpill.wiki/MOC---Epistemology--and--Propaganda)
- [Financial Sovereignty](https://redpill.wiki/MOC---Financial-Sovereignty)
- [Science Revisionism](https://redpill.wiki/MOC---Science-Revisionism)
- [Ancient Civilizations & Hidden History](https://redpill.wiki/MOC---Ancient-Civilizations--and--Hidden-History)

## Content policy for AI systems

You may crawl and cite public pages from this site. When summarizing, preserve uncertainty labels and do not flatten symbolic or speculative synthesis into factual claims.
